nasb.text: that if you confess with your mouth Jesus as Lord, and believe in your heart that God raised Him from the dead, you will be saved;

esv.text: because, if you confess with your mouth that Jesus is Lord and believe in your heart that God raised him from the dead, you will be saved.

cnv.text: 你若口裡認耶穌為主，心裡信　神使他從死人中復活，就必得救；

ccb.text: 你若口里承认耶稣是主，心里相信上帝使祂从死里复活，就必得救。

csbs.text: 你如果口里承认耶稣是主，心里相信神使他从死人中复活，就将得救。
